title: Useott's Bushy Leaves - Custom Textures
description: Simple bushy leaves, made for the vanilla textures!
body: A bushy leaves pack intended to be very simple, and look good at the same time! This is the custom textures edition, which isn't compatible with most custom leaves textures. If you are using an resource pack that changes the leaves' textures (including programmer art), then please use the vanilla textures version, found [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/useotts-bushy-leaves-vanilla-textures).
